Commands to inspect and modify individual items in collections within this project

Usage:
  katalyst item [command]

Available Commands:
  list        List items in a collection with their check status.
  get         Print an item (frontmatter and body by default).
  add         Create a new item with the given frontmatter and an empty body.
  update      Set/merge frontmatter keys into an existing item; body untouched.
  delete      Delete one or more items.

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for item

Use "katalyst item [command] --help" for more information about a command.
